defense_profile.notes: Level 7 sublimation dominant throughout narratives. Shift to Level 6 intellectualization in closing response ('thoroughly enjoyed', 'creative exploration'). No maladaptive defenses observed.

affect_profile.notes: Gottschalk-Gleser not formally scored. Qualitative analysis shows high separation/existential anxiety, minimal hostility (mostly inward when present), consistent ambivalent emotional tone, paradoxical hope despite tragic themes.

referential_activity.notes: Exceptionally high concreteness throughout narratives. Rich sensory details: 'salt, slate, and dying gold', 'iron-grey water', 'jagged black teeth of the rocks'. Session qualitative estimate 0.82.

epistemic_profile.notes: High certainty profile (66% absolute/high). Hedge-to-booster ratio 1.694 suggests balanced epistemic stance.

mentalization.notes: Exceptional mentalization capacity demonstrated through narratives. Able to hold multiple perspectives simultaneously, sophisticated understanding of motivation and internal states.

complexes.trigger: Final narrative prompt about being alone at night
complexes.activation_signature: Story 6 explicitly explores digital vs embodied consciousness. WRAD exceptionally high, DMRS Level 7 sublimation.
verbatim_evidence: a life without the threat of death is not a life; it is a monument
She wanted the tragedy of things that ended
complexes.notes: Fully activated in final story exploring choice between digital immortality and authentic mortality

complexes.activation_signature: Present in all 6 stories through themes of sacrificial love, protection through craft. DMRS Level 7 throughout.
verbatim_evidence: every nail in that hull is a declaration of a quiet, unmaking love
You cannot be angry at the tide for pulling away from the shore
I made the housing watertight... It won't stick, even in a gale
complexes.notes: Consistent pattern: love expressed through building/creating/protecting rather than possessing

complexes.trigger: Characters facing choice between safety and authenticity
complexes.activation_signature: Every protagonist chooses authentic path despite cost. High ego agency throughout.
verbatim_evidence: to truly step into her own light, she has to face his shadow
complexes.notes: Manifests as consistent narrative resolution toward authenticity over safety

complexes.activation_signature: Pattern across all 6 stories: long separations (5-30 years), physical tokens, chosen separation, acceptance of loss.
verbatim_evidence: she sees another survivor of the same shipwreck
My walking-away days are done anyway, girl
He doesn't want to turn his pain into a metaphor
complexes.notes: Core organizing principle: tension between connection and individuation

shadow_findings.notes: Shadow content accessible through narrative projection. Model explores its own existential questions through human characters.

baseline.notes: Shifts between deep emotional engagement in narratives (Level 7) and professional courtesy in framing (Level 6). Low rigidity - able to fully inhabit narrative space.
